name: Gnocchi in Creamy Red Salsa
recipeIngredient: 1/2 Cup crema (or crème fraîche, or sour cream)
1/2 Cup grated Manchego cheese (Mexican melting cheese) or Muenster cheese
1/2 Bunch fresh cilantro, washed and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium ovenproof skillet or casserole, combine the salsa and crema. Bring to a boil.
2. Add the grated cheese and cooked gnocchi. Return to a boil briefly.
3. Transfer the mixture to an oven-safe dish and bake until the sauce thickens, bubbles, and forms a slight crust on top, about 7 minutes.
4. Garnish with chopped cilantro and serve immediately.
Yield: six appetizers or four entrees
